options.label: Date preset
options.plain_language_help: Quickly switch to common date windows like last 7 or last 30 days.
options.trust_impact: Changes denominator and comparison context for all subscription metrics.

options.label: Current vs future flow state
options.plain_language_help: Compare production flow with planned future flow behavior.
options.is_disabled_reason: Future-flow simulation feed is not available in fixture mode.
options.trust_impact: Disabled dimensions are excluded from export manifest filters.

metric_definitions: Filter options are governed by source-of-truth and data-dependency rules.
Disabled filters include explicit reasons and never silently disappear.
Shopify is context-only and does not finalize subscription outcome truth.

presentation.executive_summary: Advanced filters expose required subscription dimensions and include disabled reasons where data dependencies are not yet available.
presentation.comparison_label: Comparison baseline unavailable in fixture preview
presentation.source_authority_explanation: Stay.ai is the authoritative source for final subscription outcomes.
presentation.trust_explanation: Trust is high because the required source-of-truth confirmation rules are satisfied.
presentation.freshness_explanation: Data is fresh and within expected recency.
presentation.drilldown_hint: Use filter_id values to bind UI controls and export manifests.
presentation.empty_state_copy: No eligible records were available for this calculation window.
presentation.blocked_state_copy: This metric is blocked until Stay.ai confirmation records are available.
